_comment: Alpine Linux cloud image -- the apk FAMILY (PROXY-ONLY; dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org is a single CDN, no mirror sprawl). OPERATOR must PIN upstream_sha256 and add dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org to fleet mirror_allowlist. NOTE: Alpine uses OpenRC (not systemd) and musl; CAVEAT: an agent `exec apk add` may need http_proxy set in the command (ssh non-interactive does not source profile.d).
